productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Shimmery Patch Black Top
description: CompositionBlack round neck top in 100%  viscose in straight silhouette with a dash of shimmer, foil, sequin and studs and short sleeves, tie up lace at the side of the necklineFittingRegularWash CareMachine wash/Hand washWash separate in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not wring dryDry in shadeMedium ironStylish and sleek, this purple top from jealous 21's Jealous 18 range is a great evening wear. Perfect for weekend parties, the front sequenced panel made of mesh stitched to the main fabric in gathers adds to the top an absolutely feminine look, while the dolman sleeves accentuate the rounded beauty of your arms, enhancing your features. Made of viscose rayon, this top has a silky appearance and feel, but allows your body to breathe as well as it does in cotton weaves. Pair this top with jeans and stylish feminine sandals available in a wide range at myntra.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
